leadership_team.name: Mg Emily Bolo
leadership_team.bio: Passionate about leading others into deeper prayer. Has been appointed as the Director of the Master Guide program.

leadership_team.name: Elder Ralph Osoti
leadership_team.bio: A seasoned elder with decades of youth ministry experience. He is the Elder overseeing the entire Master Guide program.

leadership_team.name: Mg Monica Yom Bullen
leadership_team.bio: Dedicated to promoting holistic health and well-being.

leadership_team.name: Elder Abraham
leadership_team.bio: Coordinates the prayer cell network and supports the trainers and directors.

leadership_team.name: Mg Nancy Lucia
leadership_team.bio: Oversees my Master Guide group where we are five members, providing guidance and mentorship for the team.
